privileged_info_summary: The InventoryManager Android project is a synthetic test case with an Item data class (6 fields: id/String, name/String, quantity/Int, price/Double, description/String, isInStock/Boolean) that intentionally lacks Parcelable implementation and the kotlin-parcelize plugin (uses Android Gradle 8.2.0 and Kotlin 1.9.20). The project files are located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/InventoryManager with the Item.kt at app/src/main/java/com/example/inventory/model/Item.kt and build.gradle.kts at app/build.gradle.kts. The compilation error occurs because MainActivity attempts to pass the Item object via Intent.putExtra() without it implementing Parcelable. The fix requires three changes: enable kotlin-parcelize plugin in build.gradle.kts, annotate Item with @Parcelize, and implement Parcelable interface. Android Studio 2024.2.1.11 is used for the environment.
